mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_info (order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, pay_amount, discount_amount, pay_type, pay_time, delivery_time, finish_time, cancel_time, remark, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.userId}, #{item.orderStatus}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.payAmount}, #{item.discountAmount}, #{item.payType}, #{item.payTime}, #{item.deliveryTime}, #{item.finishTime}, #{item.cancelTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO order_info (order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, pay_amount, discount_amount, pay_type, pay_time, delivery_time, finish_time, cancel_time, remark, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.userId}, #{item.orderStatus}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.payAmount}, #{item.discountAmount}, #{item.payType}, #{item.payTime}, #{item.deliveryTime}, #{item.finishTime}, #{item.cancelTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE order_status = VALUES(order_status), total_amount = VALUES(total_amount), pay_amount = VALUES(pay_amount), discount_amount = VALUES(discount_amount), pay_type = VALUES(pay_type), pay_time = VALUES(pay_time), delivery_time = VALUES(delivery_time), finish_time = VALUES(finish_time), cancel_time = VALUES(cancel_time), remark = VALUES(remark), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
